name: finance-manager-worker
description: Cloudflare Worker + D1 API scaffold for Finance Manager (preparation; not yet live).

scripts.d1:migrate:dev: wrangler d1 migrations apply finance-manager-dev --remote --env dev
scripts.d1:migrate:prod: wrangler d1 migrations apply finance-manager --remote --env prod
scripts.secret:dev: wrangler secret put JWT_SECRET --env dev && wrangler secret put GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET --env dev
scripts.secret:prod: wrangler secret put JWT_SECRET --env prod && wrangler secret put GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET --env prod
